overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character riding a horse through a foggy, snow-covered mountain pass. The character approaches a stone cabin, dismounts, and enters the building as the weather clears slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain pass between cliff walls

agents.ego_description: riding a horse through a narrow foggy mountain pass with steep cliffs on the left

notable_agents.action: horse carrying the rider through deep snow along the mountain path

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face covered in snow forming the left boundary of the path
deep snow covering the mountain trail
scattered boulders covered in snow on the right side of the path
partially frozen lake visible through the fog on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character rides a horse through a narrow, foggy mountain pass. Steep snow-covered cliffs line the left side while scattered rocks appear on the right. Heavy snowfall and fog create low visibility as they travel along the snow-covered trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley with scattered trees

events.description: fog begins to clear revealing distant mountain peaks and a stone cabin ahead
begins circling around the stone cabin to approach from the side

agents.ego_description: riding the horse toward the stone cabin as visibility improves

notable_agents.action: horse walking through deep snow toward the cabin

entered.detail: small stone cabin with snow-covered thatched roof nestled in the valley
snow-covered mountain peaks becoming visible as fog clears
scattered evergreen trees covered in snow

segments.scene_description: As the fog clears, a stone cabin becomes visible in the snowy valley ahead. The character rides toward it, passing scattered snow-covered trees, and begins to circle around the structure. The mountain range emerges in the background as visibility improves.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin exterior with wooden porch and stairs

events.description: dismounts the horse and begins walking on foot around the cabin

agents.ego_description: dismounts the horse and walks around the cabin exterior examining the structure

notable_agents.action: horse standing idle near the cabin where the rider dismounted

entered.detail: wooden staircase leading up to the cabin entrance porch

segments.scene_description: The character dismounts the horse and walks around the cabin exterior. Wooden stairs leading to the entrance become visible on the left side of the structure. The horse remains standing near the dismount point while the frozen lake stays visible in the valley to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin entrance porch under roof overhang

events.description: ascends the wooden stairs to reach the cabin door
opens the wooden door and enters the dark cabin interior

agents.ego_description: walking up the wooden stairs and entering the stone cabin

entered.detail: wooden door with metal hinges set in the stone wall
dark shadowy interior visible through the open doorway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the cabin entrance, ascends the wooden stairs under the snow-covered roof overhang, and opens the door. The dark interior becomes visible as the character steps inside, leaving the snowy landscape behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a blindingly snowy mountain pass that gradually opens up to reveal a secluded stone cabin. It begins with a ride along a narrow trail flanked by steep, snow-covered cliffs and scattered rocks, where heavy snowfall and dense fog severely limit visibility. As the fog lifts, the camera moves toward a stone cabin nestled in a valley, passing frozen trees while the surrounding mountain range emerges in the distance. The scene then shifts as the character dismounts and walks past a frozen lake toward the cabin's exterior, approaching a set of wooden stairs beneath a snow-laden roof. Finally, the camera follows the character as they ascend the steps and open the door, transitioning from the bright, frozen landscape into the dark interior of the building.
